cases.input: Run event storming, story mapping, rule extraction, GWT acceptance criteria, traceability, and anti-pattern detection for loan origination.
Run event storming for an order lifecycle and identify events, commands, aggregates, actors, and hot spots.
Create a story map with activities, user stories, release slices, and user value.
Extract business rules with conditions, actions, types, and linked use cases.
Write Given/When/Then acceptance criteria for a registration story.
Create a traceability matrix from requirements to use cases, flows, tests, and acceptance criteria.
Scan requirements for ambiguity, untestability, over-specification, missing exceptions, scope creep, and gold plating.
What is the weather forecast tomorrow?
Create a full traceability matrix but leave every test and acceptance field empty.
